title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 355.186 - Member's rights, obligations
text:
355.186.  Member's rights, obligations. — All members shall have the same rights and obligations with respect to voting, dissolution, redemption and transfer, unless the articles or bylaws establish classes of membership with different rights and obligations with respect to any other matters, except as set forth in or authorized by the articles or bylaws.
(L. 1994 H.B. 1095) 
Effective 7-01-95
